algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived hospital door schedule clear-opening check
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: hospital renovation phasing and door schedule. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.ncarb_scenario_theme: hospital renovation phasing and door schedule
scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Door schedule review variant with construction tolerance and documentation check.

query_preferences.meaning: prioritize documented opening area in door schedule review

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.

source_task_origin.ncarb_scenario_theme: hospital renovation phasing and door schedule

algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Door schedule review variant with construction tolerance and documentation check.
algorithm_input.nonlinear_or_auxiliary_note: Contains a helper expression such as max(), abs(), symbolic division, or a variable product.
